title: cs war
description:
a Datapack that adds 4 guns, a plane, an imitation of a Freebird that was made by doctor4t, granades, c4 and ammo for the weapons.

Disclaimer: uses a custom recource pack.
body:
a Datapack that adds 4 weapons: Pistol, Rifle, Sniper, HuntigRifle. a Plane, a Blimp called Freebird that is an imitation of a blimp that doctor4t made int his video: "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jfjs0MNpf8c". granades and c4. The whole datapack is multiplayer friendly. Headshots Deal more damage.



disclaimers:\
1: The datapack uses a custom recource pack provided in the zip file.\
2: The datapack makes a custom dimension that the Freebird uses as its inside.\
3: uses a custom shader to add new custom armors it works usually works if you have a pc but might glitch if you are playing on a laptop


usability:\
1: to get all of the items in the datapack except: huntign rifle,  The Freebird and The plane\
to get the hunting rifle run the command: /function cs_war:hunting_rifle/1\
to spawn the freebird run the command: /function cs_war:spawn_free_bird\
to spawn the plane run the command: /function cs_war:spawn_plane


customisation:
Pistol Firerate: scoreboard players set firerate csw_FirerateRP <custom value>
Rifle Firerate: scoreboard players set firerate csw_FirerateRR <custom value>
Sniper Firerate: scoreboard players set firerate csw_FirerateRS <custom value>
Hunting Rifle Firerate: scoreboard players set firerate csw_FirerateRHR <custom value>
Pistol Damage: scoreboard players set damage csw_PistolDamage <custom value>
Rifle Damage: scoreboard players set damage csw_RifleDamage <custom value>
Sniper Damage: scoreboard players set damage csw_SniperDamage <custom value>
Hunting Rifle Damage: scoreboard players set damage csw_HRifleDamage <custom value>
